pullRequest.title: Add Alpine variants for Docker builds in Makefile and Dockerfile
pullRequest.body:
- Introduced new Docker build targets for Alpine variants of the client and server images in the Makefile.
- Enhanced the Dockerfile to include build stages for Alpine, creating standalone, OPA client, EOPA client, and Cedar client images.
- Updated the build process to support Alpine-based dependencies and configurations, improving image efficiency and compatibility.

<!-- If your PR fixes an open issue, use `Closes #999` to link your PR with the issue. #999 stands for the issue number you are fixing -->

pullRequest.title: Fix Datadog APM
pullRequest.body:
## Fixes Issue

Closes #838 

## Changes proposed

Fixed ([start.sh](vscode-file://vscode-app/Applications/Visual%20Studio%20Code.app/Contents/Resources/app/out/vs/code/electron-browser/workbench/workbench.html)) APM boolean logic. 
- The previous condition required `OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM` to be empty AND set to "true". 
- The new condition:
    - disables APM if `OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM` is unset
    - enables APM if `OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM` is set with no value or "true" 

Updated apm.py for compatibility with dd-trace 2.0>.
- Replaced deprecated FILTERS parameter with trace_processors
- Renamed and improved trace filter class:
    - FilterRootPathTraces → DropRootPathTraces
    - Improved error handling in URL parsing with fail-open approach
    
Pin python to 3.12.x in pre-commit check to avoid Python 3.14 hook/env build issues with docformatter deps

## Check List (Check all the applicable boxes) <!-- Follow the above conventions to check the box -->

- [x] I sign off on contributing this submission to open-source
- [x] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] My change requires changes to the documentation.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [x] All new and existing tests passed.
- [x] This PR does not contain plagiarized content.
- [x] The title of my pull request is a short description of the requested changes.

```
opal_client-1  | [2025-10-30 15:44:38 +0000] [7] [INFO] Starting gunicorn 23.0.0
```

Server After:
```
 docker-compose -f docker-compose-example.yml up opal_server
[+] Running 2/2
 ✔ Container opal-example-broadcast_channel-1  Running                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         0.0s

Attaching to opal_server-1

opal_server-1  | 2025-10-31T14:39:36.516385+0000 | 17 | opal_common.monitoring.metrics          | INFO  | DogStatsD metrics disabled
```

## Note to reviewers

Manual testing of `OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM`

```
for v in unset "" true false 0 yes; do (unset OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM; [ "$v" != unset ] && export OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM="$v"; if [[ -n "${OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM+x}" && ( -z "${OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM}" || "${OPAL_ENABLE_DATADOG_APM}" = "true" ) ]]; then r=ENABLE; else r=DISABLE; fi; echo "$
v:$r"); done
unset:DISABLE
:ENABLE
true:ENABLE
false:DISABLE
0:DISABLE
yes:DISABLE
```
